name: horizonxl
description: Horizon XL - general-purpose agentic future simulation lab

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:backend: if [ ! -x .venv/bin/python ]; then python3.11 -m venv .venv || python3 -m venv .venv; fi && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: if [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ]; then cd backend && .venv/bin/python run.py; elif [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then cd backend && ../.venv/bin/python run.py; else npm run setup:backend && cd backend && ../.venv/bin/python run.py; fi
scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:horizon-gate && npm run check:frontend
